Bound.description: A crop-safe [min, max] envelope for one scalar climate target — the range the Phase 3 optimizer may refine that target within, never outside (RFC-005). min must be ≤ max, both must sit inside the target's generic physical range, and the envelope must contain the stage's own baseline target (enforced server-side; a violation is 422).

min.description: Lower edge of the crop-safe range.

max.description: Upper edge of the crop-safe range.

ZoneBounds.description: A stage's crop-safe envelope for the numeric per-zone irrigation targets, applied uniformly to every zone in the stage — a crop's safe soil-moisture and drain-cadence window is a property of the crop/growth stage, not of which bench a zone is. Each Bound obeys the same rules as a climate Bound (min ≤ max, inside the target's physical range, and it must contain every zone's baseline target; a violation is 422). A zone's schedule carries no envelope.

StageBounds.description: A growth stage's crop-safe envelope: an optional Bound per scalar climate target, plus an optional per-zone irrigation envelope (`zones`). It is the canonical envelope the platform enforces on optimizer setpoint writes and exposes to the optimizer via the planning-context read. An absent target means no crop-specific envelope for it — only the generic physical bound applies. Time-of-day (day_start/day_end) and a zone's schedule are not optimizer-refined and carry no envelope.

ProfileStage.description: One growth stage of a crop profile: the target bundle it applies, plus an optional crop-safe envelope the targets may be refined within.

stage.description: Growth stage label (e.g. propagation, vegetative, fruiting).

CropProfile.description: (2b) A named, stage-aware bundle of climate + irrigation targets for a crop — the reusable library entry an operator assigns to a greenhouse (platform §5).

stages.description: The stage-aware target bundles, one per growth stage.

CropProfilePatch.description: (2b) Partial update of a CropProfile — any subset of name/crop/stages. The id is immutable (path identity).

Assignment.description: (2b) Which profile and growth stage are currently assigned to a greenhouse (platform §5).

stage.description: The assigned growth stage; must be one of the profile's stages.

AssignmentInput.description: (2b) Assign a profile/stage to the greenhouse in the path. The greenhouse identity comes from the path, not the body.
